title: ExoVeinmine
description: Adds a rechargeable vein mining system
body:
[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/HdnjcmNn)

Requires [ExoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/exolib) to be installed.

Adds a rechargeable vein mining system that can be obtained through an enchantment, commands, or via the config.

Features:
- Vein mining is activated by pressing the activation key while you break a block (Defaults to '~').
- Access to vein mining is highly customizable. Access can be obtained via an enchantment, through commands, or via the config file.
- Vein mining has a charge meter that builds up over time, each block broken by vein mining depletes some charge. Max charge/Charge rage/Charge usage and can all be configured in the config file. Charge can also be completely disabled if desired.
- Enhanced vein mining can be accessed with a tool that has the Vein Mining enchantment at level 2, or with custom access via the command "/syncedtag @s add exoveinmine-enhanced". (NOTE: If providing vein mining access via tags, the player must have BOTH tags to access enhanced vein mining.)
- Adds a new mining potion that increases vein miner charge rate and decreases charge usage when vein mining. This new potion can be brewed with an Awkward Potion and Glowberries and extended/amplified with redstone and glowstone. (Potion brewing can be disabled via the config if desired.)
- A new bar is displayed on the gui to show your current vein miner charge if you have access to vein mining. (This bar normally is visible if you are holding the activation key, and have access to vein mining. Visibility settings can be configured in the config.)
